message:
feat(cli): add ntm audit subcommands for log query and verification (bd-h5oyj)

Implements `ntm audit show|search|verify|export|list` subcommands using
the existing internal/audit package. Supports time range filters, event
type/actor filtering, glob target patterns, full-text regex search,
JSON/CSV export, and hash-chain integrity verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 		newHealthCmd(),
 		newDoctorCmd(),
